rendering.rationale: Object constancy via DOM enables rich interactivity and smooth transitions.

interaction.tooltip: d3-delaunay / d3-voronoi overlay for expanded hover targets

layout_options.network: d3-force with d3.forceCollide to prevent overlap

rendering.rationale: DOM manipulation becomes bottleneck; Canvas + blend modes highlight density hotspots.

interaction.tooltip: d3-quadtree nearest-neighbor search on mousemove (O(log n))
interaction.zoom: geometric zooming — pixels at overview, detailed glyphs at zoom k > threshold

layout_options.categorical: deterministic jittering (random noise within bin width)

aggregation_strategies.name: Hexbin
aggregation_strategies.encoding: hexagonal cells, color intensity = bin count

aggregation_strategies.name: Stochastic Sampling
aggregation_strategies.technique: random subset N≈2000 preserving statistical properties

interaction.filtering: dynamic query widgets (range sliders) before rendering
interaction.zoom: semantic zooming: clusters at level 0, individual points at level > 5

rendering.rationale: CPU-based rendering fails; GPU parallelization required for interactive frame rates.
